prompt:
Generate a high-fidelity design draft based on the uploaded wireframe/prototype as a reference.

Design Type: Promotion Page / App Interface / H5 Page / E-commerce Detail Page / Official Website / Infographic

Requirements:
1. Retain the original layout structure, information hierarchy, and module division of the page.
2. Replace placeholders in the wireframe with actual content.
3. Automatically add color schemes, images, icons, and typography details.
4. Enhance the visual hierarchy, white space, alignment, and module relationships of the page.
5. Output as a complete, high-fidelity design draft.

Visual Style: Minimalist Modern / Tech / Skeuomorphic / Fresh / Brand Identity / Premium
Primary Color: blue
Secondary Color: [Enter color]
Aspect Ratio: [e.g., 9:16 / 4:3 / 16:9]

Note:
Keep the original structure and do not disrupt the order of modules.
Focus on optimizing visual presentation and realistic content to make it look like a complete design draft ready for proposal presentations.

Keep the original information architecture of the wireframe unchanged, only enhancing visual completeness and realism.
